skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. Metal γ: ATK ▲ 58.08% continuously. Activates once per battle.
skill1.where: skill1[0] — passive → self, buff atkPct 58.08 (no duration)
skill1.note: Modeled as a permanent passive. Justified: γ is granted once at battle start and only removed 'when an ally is out of action', which never occurs under scope-lock (no ally deaths), so it stays up the whole fight.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when in Metal γ status after landing 10 normal attacks. Affects all allies. Recovers 2.04% of the skill user's final Max HP as HP.
skill1.where: skill1[1] — trigger hitCount count:10 → allies, effect { kind: heal }
skill1.note: Wired as a heal EVENT (no magnitude encoded) so 'on-recovery' consumers (Crown-style) can proc. Inert alone vs the boss — adds no damage. The 2.04% final-Max-HP value is intentionally not expressed; only the event hook matters for damage.

skill1.kitLine: Activates if the skill user is in Metal γ status when an ally is out of action. Affects 1 incapacitated ally unit(s) with the highest final ATK (except the skill user). Resurrect with 96% HP.
skill1.note: Inert under scope-lock — no ally ever goes out of action, so the γ-gated resurrect never fires. Correctly skipped.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when an ally is out of action. Affects self. Removes Metal γ.
skill1.note: Inert under scope-lock (no ally deaths). This skip is exactly WHY the +58.08% ATK can be modeled as permanent — the only γ-removal trigger never fires.

skill2.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. Metal σ: Burst Gauge filling speed ▲ 70.4% continuously.
skill2.where: skill2[0] — passive → self, buff burstGenPct 70.4 (no duration)
skill2.note: Modeled permanent. σ is removed only at an FB-entry consumed in σ and re-granted whenever she casts Burst before that FB ends, so as the bursting B3 (or a never-bursting lone B3) σ is effectively permanent. Overstated in multi-B3 rotations where she skips bursts (see caveat).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst in Metal σ status. Affects self. Attack Damage ▲ 21.12% for 10 sec. ATK ▲ 63.36% for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1] — trigger burstCast → self, buff attackDamagePct 21.12 dur 10 + buff atkPct 63.36 dur 10
skill2.note: TRIGGER RE-KEYED from fullBurstEnter (raw parse) to burstCast per note (prior-10 / HARD RULE 6). σ is maintained only by her own burst casts, so post-first-FB the buff is gated on HER bursting; fullBurstEnter would over-credit every multi-B3 FB. Identical to fullBurstEnter when she is the sole B3 (standard context). Known residual: σ starts granted, so the true first-FB proc + a one-FB phase offset in multi-B3 is not captured (no σ state machine in engine).

skill2.kitLine: Removes Metal σ. (tail of the FB-self-buff line)
skill2.note: Subsumed into the burstCast re-key approximation + the permanent burstGen passive; engine has no σ state to remove. Documented, not a silent drop.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects 1 ally unit(s) with the longest basic Charge Time. Charge Time ▼ 0.18 sec for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[2] — trigger fullBurstEnter → allies, buff chargeSpeedPct 18 dur 10
skill2.note: Two approximations: (a) magnitude — 0.18s absolute converted to chargeSpeedPct 18 at an assumed ~1.0s basic charge (unmeasured ⚑); (b) target — 'longest basic Charge Time' single-target selection is not engine-expressible, so widened to `allies`. Harmless because chargeSpeedPct is inert on non-charge weapons and control teams carry ≤1 charge unit.

skill2.kitLine: Activates if the skill user has cast Burst Skill before Full Burst ends. Affects self. Metal σ: Burst Gauge filling speed ▲ 70.4% continuously.
skill2.where: unmodeled.skill2[1] + [2] ('Metal σ: Burst Gauge filling speed ▲ 70.4% continuously.')
skill2.note: The σ re-grant block. Subsumed into the permanent burstGenPct 70.4 passive (skill2[0]) — as the bursting B3 σ is effectively always up, so the re-grant adds nothing beyond the permanent encoding. Documented approximation, not a silent drop.

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Sustained Damage ▲ 52.8% for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[0] — trigger burstCast → self, buff sustainedDamagePct 52.8 dur 10
burst.note: burstCast dur-10 on a ≥40s burst CD → no buff-overlap multiplication. Amplifies the sustained DoT bucket below.

burst.kitLine: Affects 1 enemy unit(s) nearest to the crosshair. Deals 396% of final ATK as sustained damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[1] — trigger burstCast → enemy, dot atkPct 396 dur 10 interval 1 flavor sustained
burst.note: 10 ticks/cast; ~59% of her damage per note (MANIFEST). duration (10s) ≤ re-trigger interval (≥40s CD) → NO DoT-overlap multiplication (prior-3 satisfied; a per-cast DoT, not maintained). Ticks landing inside FB get +50% by timing (prior-2 — no noFb anywhere). 'nearest to crosshair' single-target → `enemy` (partless single boss under scope-lock, so target selection is moot).

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: FB self buffs (Attack Damage +21.12% / ATK +63.36%) keyed to her OWN burst cast — the Metal σ economy approximation. Exact when she is the sole Burst III; a multi-B3 team's true σ state machine (battle-start grant, remove-on-FB, re-grant-on-her-cast) is phase-shifted vs this encoding.
documentedConfounds.why: Under scope-lock / standard sole-B3 context burstCast ≡ fullBurstEnter, so no gap. Only a multi-B3 team would phase-shift it (burstCast under-credits FBs she didn't burst → would trend COLD there), but that is outside the validated context and there is no board data to compare.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Metal σ burst-gauge +70.4% modeled permanent — overstated in multi-B3 rotations where she skips bursts (σ drops until her next burst).
documentedConfounds.why: burstGenPct only accelerates burst gauge fill; if overstated it would make her (and the team) burst more often → sim over-models burst-cadence-driven damage → HOT. But effect is indirect and small under scope-lock where she bursts on CD anyway; primarily a multi-B3 risk.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Charge Time ▼0.18 sec ally support approximated as chargeSpeedPct 18 to all allies — magnitude is an unmeasured ⚑ (0.18s ÷ the target's basic charge time) and the 'longest basic Charge Time' single-target selection is not engine-expressible (inert on non-charge allies).
documentedConfounds.why: Affects an ally's charge cadence, not Mana's own damage; inert on non-charge weapons and control teams carry ≤1 charge unit. Magnitude ⚑ could shift a charge ally's damage in either direction but does not move Mana's own ratio directly.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: hitCount-10 team heal is an event-only synergy hook (Crown-style recovery consumers); it adds no damage alone.
documentedConfounds.why: The heal carries no damage and no encoded magnitude; it exists only to proc on-recovery consumers. In a team with no such consumer it is inert, so it cannot by itself open a sim/real gap on Mana.

documentedConfounds.text: cadence: pullsPerSec / reloadFrames 121 are unverified datamine (mandatory ⚑).
documentedConfounds.why: Cadence drives both her own AR normal-attack damage and the hitCount-10 heal/consumer cadence. 60-ammo AR at class rate empties in ~5s with no escalation tell; if reloadFrames/pullsPerSec are wrong her sustained normal-attack + DoT-amp uptime shifts, most plausibly over-modeling fire uptime → HOT (direction unverified — flagged as mandatory ⚑).

documentedConfounds.text: note ⚑(3): σ-economy trigger phase — verify buff presence on FBs she didn't burst in a multi-B3 recording (burstCast approximation).
documentedConfounds.why: Same root as the skill2 trigger caveat; only bites in multi-B3 comps outside the validated sole-B3 context. No board data exists to manifest it.

documentedConfounds.text: note ⚑(4): heal/hitCount-10 consumer cadence (synergy-only) is unmeasured.
documentedConfounds.why: Only relevant to on-recovery consumer uptime on a teammate; adds no damage on Mana herself and is inert without such a consumer.

authorIntentSummary: The override is an explicit PARSER-BASELINE HYPOTHESIS (banner not yet removed — unmeasured, not hand-tuned) modeling Mana's whole kit: S1 Metal γ as a permanent self ATK +58.08% passive (γ never removed under scope-lock since no ally dies) plus a magnitude-less hitCount-10 team heal wired purely as an on-recovery consumer event hook; S2 Metal σ as a permanent self burstGenPct +70.4% passive, the FB self Attack-Damage/ATK buffs RE-KEYED from fullBurstEnter to burstCast to match the σ economy (identical when she is the sole B3), and the Charge-Time ally support approximated as chargeSpeedPct 18 to all allies; and the burst as a self sustainedDamagePct +52.8% buff plus a 396%-final-ATK sustained DoT (10 ticks/cast, no overlap on the 40s CD, ~59% of her damage). Key approximations: the σ state machine is collapsed into permanent/re-keyed encodings (exact for sole-B3, phase-shifted in multi-B3), the charge-support magnitude/target are unmeasured, and cadence (pullsPerSec/reloadFrames 121) is an unverified datamine ⚑. Known-not-yet-faithful spots are all documented as caveats/unmodeled (resurrect + γ/σ removal inert under scope-lock; σ re-grant subsumed into the permanent passive); there are NO silent drops — every kit line is either a block or a documented unmodeled entry, and the unit has no board accuracy data yet.
